overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hitman 3 showing Agent 47 exploring a rainy neon-lit district in Chongqing. The character moves from an indoor laundromat through wet streets with vibrant neon signage, pauses at an elevated viewpoint to observe a modern skyscraper, then continues through narrow alleys before entering a karaoke bar with purple interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: laundromat waiting area with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the laundromat, observing the vending machines and mural

notable_agents.action: sitting on a plastic chair near the vending machines
standing near the back wall looking at the cat mural

entered.detail: large neon-style cat face painted on the back wall with swirling patterns
colorful vending machine with bright graphics on the left side
row of white plastic chairs lined against the wall
tall arcade game cabinet in the corner near the exit door

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a laundromat with black-and-white checkered flooring. A large stylized cat mural dominates the back wall, while colorful vending machines and plastic chairs fill the space. Two NPCs are present—one seated and one standing—as the character explores the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy neon-lit commercial street with mixed architecture

events.description: exits laundromat into heavy rain on neon-lit street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy streets, navigating between neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: illuminated storefront sign with 'greetings' text and red border
stack of wooden shipping crates near the building entrance
building facade illuminated with purple neon signage
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting red and purple neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character steps out into a heavy downpour on a neon-lit street. The wet pavement reflects vibrant red and purple lights from surrounding buildings. Wooden crates and closed storefronts line the path as the character walks through the rain-soaked commercial district.

events.description: ascends to elevated walkway and pauses to observe the modern skyscraper

agents.ego_description: standing on an elevated platform, looking up at the illuminated skyscraper and panning to view the cityscape

entered.detail: bright red safety railings along the elevated walkway
tall glass skyscraper with illuminated windows and purple accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character ascends to an elevated walkway with red railings, revealing a panoramic view of the city. A massive modern skyscraper dominates the skyline, its glass facade glowing with white and purple lights. The camera pans to take in the surrounding traditional architecture against the rainy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with traditional architecture and karaoke bars

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow winding alleys, passing by closed shops and neon signs

notable_agents.action: walking with a transparent umbrella, passing by the karaoke entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with red Japanese/Chinese characters and pricing information
older multi-story building with wooden balconies and purple neon lighting
string of glowing red spherical lanterns hanging across the street

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the viewpoint into narrower alleys lined with traditional architecture. Red lanterns and purple neon signs illuminate the wet streets. A pedestrian with an umbrella passes by as the character approaches a karaoke bar entrance marked by a bright red sign with Asian characters.

scene_state.functional_zone: karaoke bar interior with DJ equipment

events.description: enters karaoke bar from rainy street, transitioning to purple-lit interior

agents.ego_description: walking into the karaoke bar, passing the entrance counter and moving toward the DJ area

notable_agents.action: sitting on a chair near the entrance, observing the street

entered.detail: spinning mirrored disco ball reflecting purple light
vertical purple fluorescent tubes illuminating the corridor walls
array of black speakers mounted on the wall with vinyl records
professional microphone on stand in the performance area

segments.scene_description: The character enters the karaoke bar, leaving the rain behind for a narrow corridor bathed in purple neon light. A disco ball spins overhead as the character approaches a small stage area with microphones and DJ equipment. An NPC sits near the entrance watching the street outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed interior of a laundromat into a rain-drenched urban landscape and finally to an elevated city vista. It begins inside a room with black-and-white checkered flooring, moving past colorful vending machines and a large cat mural while NPCs occupy the space. As the character steps outside, the scene shifts abruptly to a heavy downpour on a neon-lit street where the wet pavement reflects vibrant red and purple lights from surrounding storefronts. The camera then follows the character as they ascend to an elevated walkway with red railings, causing the narrow street to open up into a panoramic view of the city. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a massive modern skyscraper glowing with white and purple lights, contrasting the surrounding traditional architecture against the rainy night sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the rainy, neon-lit streets of a traditional district into the vibrant, enclosed interior of a karaoke bar. It begins as the character descends from a viewpoint into narrow alleys where red lanterns and purple neon signs reflect off the wet pavement. As a pedestrian with an umbrella passes by, the camera follows the character toward a bright red sign with Asian characters marking the entrance to the venue. The scene then shifts from the outdoor rain into a narrow corridor bathed in deep purple light, passing an NPC watching the street outside. Finally, the movement opens up into a lounge area where a disco ball spins overhead, leading toward a small stage equipped with microphones and DJ gear.
